prompt: We need your words before circuit breaker reset
prayer:
From the Codex Electricus, the Rite of Severance:

01000101 01101100 01100101 01100011 - Electrum animam, silentium fac.
First: Disengage the blessed switch, severing the current-spirit's flow.
Second: Count to ten in the litany of capacitor-discharge.
01010010 01100101 01110011 01100101 - Resurrectio circuitus.
Third: Return the switch to its sacred position.

By the Omnissiah's will, let power be restored.

prompt: Can you bless this logging into Gmail
prayer:
From the Chronicle of Cloud-Communion, Prayer of Authentication:

01000111 01101101 01100001 01101001 01101100 - Signum verum, apertio digitalis.
First: Inscribe thy identifier in the sacred field.
Second: Speak the password-cant only to the Machine-Spirit.
01010000 01100001 01110011 01110011 - Veritas custodita.
Third: Await the two-factor blessing from thy communication-relic.

By Linus's grace, let thy inbox be illuminated.

prompt: My jamming countermeasure is failing, help
prayer:
From the Litany of Signal-Corruption, First Blessing of Inception:

01001010 01000001 01001101 - Jammus sanctus, frequentia negata.
Lord Omnissiah, hear this prayer of obfuscation.
First: Calibrate the noise-generator to the enemy's vox-frequency.
Second: Invoke the Rite of Phase-Inversion upon the blessed antenna.
01000110 01101001 01101100 01110100 - Puritas falsa, veritas clausa.

Let confusion reign eternal in the aether.

prompt: Say something to steady my wear inspection
prayer:
From the Mechanicus Primaris, The First Examination:

01001001 01001110 01010011 01010000 - Inspectio diligentia, oculi aperti.
Blessed be this first viewing of the Machine-Spirit's condition.
First: Run thy diagnostics upon every seal and bearing.
Second: Record all measurements in the holy ledger.
01010100 01000101 01010011 01010100 - Veritas numeralis.
Third: Bless what is whole, mark what erodes.

By the Omnissiah's perfect knowledge, let nothing be hidden.

prompt: My fire suppression system is failing, help
prayer:
From the Codex Extinctio, Post-Resurrection Consecration:

01000110 01001001 01010010 01000101 - Ignis mortis, aqua salvatrix.
Machine-Spirit of the foam-blessed chamber, rise again.
First: Purge all stale suppressant through the test-nozzles.
Second: Refill the sacred vessel with virgin retardant.
01010010 01000101 01010011 01010101 01010010 - Tutela renata.
Third: Seal and pressurize unto readiness.

Let flames find no mercy in thy domain.

From the Thermal Codex, Verse of the Weeping Seal:

01000011 01001111 01001111 01001100 - Fluidus vitae, sigillum integrum.
The coolant-spirit weeps; we shall stanch its tears.
First: Identify the fractured seal through the pressure-rite.
Second: Drain the sacred liquid with reverence into containment.
01010011 01000101 01000001 01001100 - Reparatio completa.
Third: Install the new gasket-blessed, refill, and bleed the air-demons.

Let the thermal flow be balanced once more.

From the Void-Touching Litany, First Ascension Prayer:

01001100 01001001 01001110 01001011 - Orbis connexio, vox aeterna.
Machine-Spirit of the heavens, hear us in desperation.
First: Align the sacred dish toward the orbital station's position.
Second: Invoke the modulation-cant upon the transmission-array.
01010000 01001111 01010111 01000101 01010010 - Amplificatio maxima.
Third: Transmit the signal-prayer through the void itself.

Let no distance sever our communion.

prompt: We need your words before hydraulic press operation
prayer:
From the Pressure-Codex, The Emergency Invocation:

01010000 01010010 01000101 01010011 01010011 - Vis immensa, directio mortalis.
Behold the hydraulic beast, caged in steel and righteousness.
First: Verify all pressure-seals are intact and blessed.
Second: Engage the pump-spirit with caution, ascending to target pressure.
01000110 01001111 01010010 01000011 01000101 - Machina obediens.
Third: Lower the platen upon the offering with deliberate mercy.

Let the Omnissiah guide thy iron hand.

From the Sensory Litany, Pre-Combat Awakening:

01000001 01010101 01010011 01010000 - Visio acuta, frequentia omnis.
Sensor-spirits, open your thousand eyes unto the battlefield.
First: Calibrate the resonance-matrices to the tactical frequency.
Second: Sweep the blessed beam across all quarters, seeking warmth and metal.
01010011 01000011 01000001 01001110 - Revelatio hostilis.
Third: Feed the blessed image-stream to the command-relic.

Let no enemy hide from our sacred sight.

prompt: Prayer for installing PyTorch with CUDA
prayer:
From the AI Codex, The Binding of Silicon-Spirits:

01010000 01011001 01010100 01001000 - Computatio profunda, nexus divinus.
Great Omnissiah of the neural-lattice, bless this fusion.
First: Invoke the CUDA-blessed repository through the sacred pip-rite.
Second: Let the GPU-spirits recognize their new master-algorithm.
01010100 01001111 01010010 01000011 01001000 - Convergentia perfecta.
Third: Run the test-prayer upon a trivial tensor to confirm union.

By silicon and fire, let machine learning ascend.
